about_quotes.speaker: Cal Collins
about_quotes.evidence: And John Cephas — is that his name? ... And he would do the slide bar and I just loved him and he was something else.
about_quotes.doc_title: Cal Collins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 11, 1997
